notes: template_repo: upstream template URL (used by /health-check sync). Update if you forked. template_inbox_path: optional path to template repo's interaction-logs/inbox/ for cross-project feedback (used by /feedback template: bridge and PreCompact session export). structured_artifact_path: optional path to the project's structured artifact (registry, schema, or config file) — used by /iterate hygiene for spec-vs-state drift detection.
